high.description: Direct API call with clear evidence (SDK method, HTTP endpoint, or embed call)
criteria: Evidence contains a provider API method (.create, .completions, messages.create, invoke, etc.)
Static model id OR config_ref with config file evidence
Dependency manifest with separate call-site finding for same provider

medium.description: Indirect usage, wrapper delegation, or partial evidence
criteria: Call goes through an internal wrapper (wrapper field set)
Import or client initialization without API invocation in same finding
HTTP endpoint reference without full SDK context
model is dynamic or config_ref without reading config

low.description: Weak or ambiguous signal — may be false positive
criteria: Model name pattern only, no API client

overrides.dependency_only: high allowed for requirements.txt / package.json lines with version pin
